$schema_note: Cards for the portfolio build. status: backlog|todo|doing|review|done. Agents pick cards where owner_agent = you, status = todo, and all depends_on are done. Every card also passes code-reviewer -> qa-engineer -> producer before done.

cards.summary: Scaffold Next.js 15 (TS, App Router) + Tailwind + Prettier/ESLint. NOTE: repo root is non-empty — scaffold into a temp dir (npx create-next-app@latest tmp-scaffold --ts --tailwind --app --eslint) then merge files into root, keep our CLAUDE.md/docs/.claude intact.
cards.dod: npm run build + npm run lint green, repo pushed to GitHub

cards.summary: Define routes, folder structure, and content model (MDX in content/projects/ for 4 case studies). Record decisions in docs/.
cards.dod: documented in docs/, approved, no code contradiction

cards.summary: Implement design tokens from docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md (teal palette, type, spacing) in Tailwind config + dark-mode setup with toggle.
cards.dod: tokens usable in components, dark mode toggles and persists, no FOUC

cards.summary: Connect GitHub repo to Vercel with the human product owner; deploy skeleton.
cards.dod: live Vercel URL loads the skeleton

cards.summary: Global layout: sticky header (name, nav, GitHub link, theme toggle) + footer.
cards.dod: sticky, responsive, keyboard-navigable, visible focus rings
cards.evidence: components/sections/header.tsx, components/sections/footer.tsx, components/sections/nav-link.tsx, components/ui/icons.tsx; wired into app/layout.tsx (header/main/footer landmarks + skip link); build+lint green; verified single <main id=main-content>, aria-current=page on active nav link (checked /about), all 6 routes + 404 return correct HTTP status on prod server. QA PASS 2026-07-06 (code review passed prior): build+lint green; prod server curl on all 6 routes + /nope (200x6, 404x1); exactly one <main>/<header>/<footer> per route (raw HTML, all 6 routes), nav aria-label=Main present, skip link first focusable element on every route; aria-current=page verified present exactly once and on the correct link on / (0 matches — no Home nav item, correct), /projects, /projects/aiklao (Projects active on child route), /about, /resume, /contact; headless-Edge CDP (Emulation.setDeviceMetricsOverride, not --window-size which mis-sized the viewport and produced a false-positive overflow artifact — noted as a tooling gotcha) confirmed scrollWidth===clientWidth (no horizontal overflow) at 375/768/1280 on all 6 routes; zero console/exception entries on load; dark-mode toggle verified end-to-end (click -> html.classList has dark -> computed body bg #111827 -> screenshot shows full dark theme incl. moon icon); sticky header confirmed via computed getComputedStyle position:sticky, top:0 rect stable (page content is still a stub at this stage — PF-M1-05/06/07 not yet built — so a real scroll-past-the-fold check on populated content is deferred, see manual checks); simulated Tab key sequence via CDP Input.dispatchKeyEvent confirmed order skip-link -> logo -> Projects -> About -> Resume -> Contact -> GitHub -> theme toggle, and focus-visible ring box-shadow (2px offset + 4px teal-300 ring) rendered and visible on a nav link in dark mode (screenshot); GitHub https://github.com/JodPdo HTTP 200, LinkedIn HTTP 999 (known anti-bot response, not a failure); no console.* in any component; working tree clean except this board file. Manual checks still needed from a real interactive browser (cannot be done headlessly): mouse/touch scroll confirming header stays visually pinned on a fully-populated page (defer to when PF-M1-05/06/07 land), real hardware keyboard Tab/Shift+Tab feel and ring visibility across both themes end-to-end by a human; light-mode ring contrast is tracked separately as PF-M3-04 (not blocking here).

cards.summary: Home copy from docs/SPEC.md 4.1: hero, trust strip (real clickable claims), skills groups, closing CTA.
cards.dod: facts verifiable, links real, reviewed
cards.evidence: docs/copy/home.md — QA PASS 2026-07-05: race.aiklaotrip.com HTTP 200, github.com/JodPdo HTTP 200; arithmetic 82+138+84+60+116+25=505 rendered as 500+ verified; featured order AiKlao->Typing Race->Tiger Kick locked; 2 [NEEDS-VERIFICATION] URLs (APK releases, CI/CD evidence) flagged with safe interim targets (/projects) — open items, do not block this gate

cards.summary: Build Home page from approved copy.
cards.dod: matches design system, responsive, dark mode OK
cards.evidence: QA PASS 2026-07-06: build+lint green; prod server (localhost:3000) curl of / — 1 h1, h2s for Featured projects/Skills, all 4 trust-strip items present, /projects/aiklao|typing-race|tiger-kick all 200, github.com/JodPdo + race.aiklaotrip.com present with rel=noopener noreferrer and both HTTP 200; headless-Edge CDP on / — no horizontal overflow at 375/768/1280 (scrollWidth===clientWidth), zero console errors/exceptions, dark-mode toggle confirmed (body bg rgb(17,24,39)=#111827, hero/trust-strip/cards/skills/CTA all render dark tokens, screenshots taken both themes); sticky header stays top:0 after scrolling to scrollY=965; no mailto: link, no phone number, no email string found on page

cards.summary: About copy from docs/SPEC.md 4.2: the pivot, how-I-work, timeline (2022 police -> 2024 42 Bangkok -> 2025 AiKlao -> 2026 resigned), certifications with verify links.
cards.dod: honest, verifiable, reviewed
cards.evidence: docs/copy/about.md — QA PASS 2026-07-05: no phone/email printed, no 'Bangkok' appended to station name, timeline dates match SPEC 4.2, cross-doc consistent with home.md (4.5 years / 500+ / June 2026); 6 cert verify URLs + B.Sc. status flagged NEEDS-VERIFICATION with no-link interim rendering rule — open items, do not block this gate

cards.summary: Build About page + vertical timeline component.
cards.dod: responsive, a11y (semantic list, contrast AA)
cards.evidence: app/about/page.tsx (all 5 sections + closing CTA, copy verbatim from docs/copy/about.md), components/sections/timeline.tsx (server component, <ol>/<li>, CSS-only aria-hidden connector/markers, no client JS); B.Sc. 2026 entry uses the copy doc's own unconfirmed-completion fallback phrasing ('Finishing a B.Sc. in Computer Science…') per its interim rendering rule; certifications render name · issuer with zero <a> tags (all 6 verify URLs still NEEDS-VERIFICATION); build+lint green; prod server curl of /about — exactly one <h1> ('About'), one <ol> with exactly 4 <li> (years 2022/2024/2025/2026 in order), 0 anchors inside the Certifications section, no mailto:/tel: anywhere on the page; design tokens only (primary/foreground/border/background-subtle/ring), focus-visible rings + motion-reduce on CTA links, dark mode via semantic tokens (no ad-hoc colors); no phone number, no email address on this page. QA PASS 2026-07-06 (round 2, after fix commit 848528b): initial QA pass (round 1) FAILED on timeline dot alignment — measured markers ~25px (375px) / ~33px (1280px) right of the border-l-2 connector, screenshots confirmed dots floating off the line. frontend-engineer fixed via -left-6/sm:-left-8 on the marker span (components/sections/timeline.tsx:45-54) to match the ol's own padding, keeping marker + connector in the same coordinate space. Re-verified independently: rebuilt (build+lint green again), fresh headless-Edge CDP session (Emulation.setDeviceMetricsOverride), re-measured geometry at 375/1280 — dot-center-to-connector-edge offset now exactly 2px at both (the connector's own border-stroke width), full-page + cropped screenshots visually confirm all 4 dots centered on the line in both themes; no regressions — build+lint green, no horizontal overflow at 375/768/1280, zero console errors/exceptions, dark-mode toggle still flips body bg to #111827, cert section still 0 <a> tags, ol still 4 <li> in order 2022/2024/2025/2026, no mailto:/tel:; contrast re-checked and still AA-compliant in both themes (timeline year/title/body text all >=5:1, most >=11:1).

cards.summary: Resume page: 3 tabs (SE / Backend / QA), DOWNLOAD-FIRST (buttons + thumbnails); inline embed only as desktop enhancement. PDFs from /public/resume/.
cards.dod: PDFs download on mobile + desktop, tabs keyboard-accessible

cards.summary: Contact page: email (verify with product owner first), LinkedIn, GitHub. NO phone number (product-owner decision).
cards.dod: links correct and clickable, mailto works
cards.evidence: commit f554a96; code review passed prior (email char-by-char vs SPEC incl. intentional 'aekkarut' spelling, mailto no target=_blank, no phone digits, tokens clean). QA 2026-07-06: build+lint green; prod server curl /contact 200, exactly one <h1>, mailto:fontong.jod.aekkarut@gmail.com present as href AND visible text, GitHub href=https://github.com/JodPdo and LinkedIn href=https://www.linkedin.com/in/aekkarut-fontong both target=_blank rel=noopener noreferrer, mailto anchor isolated and confirmed no target attribute, grep for +66/94-861/8164/086/089 = zero matches; headless-Edge CDP (Emulation.setDeviceMetricsOverride) on /contact: no horizontal overflow at 375/768/1280 (scrollWidth===innerWidth all three), zero console/exception entries across all navigations + after interaction; dark-mode toggle clicked -> html gains .dark, body bg rgb(17,24,39)=#111827, contact rows adopt distinct dark tokens (bg rgb(11,27,26), border color(srgb .90 .95 .94 /0.18), text rgb(230,242,240)) vs header/footer nav links (transparent bg, solid teal border) confirming page-level dark styling applied; tap targets for the three contact rows (mailto/GitHub/LinkedIn) measured via getBoundingClientRect = 343x74px each, well over the 44px minimum; curl -L https://github.com/JodPdo = 200, curl -L https://www.linkedin.com/in/aekkarut-fontong = 999 (known LinkedIn anti-bot response, recorded not failed, consistent with PF-M1-01 precedent). Observation (non-blocking, out of scope for this card): header nav links (Projects/About/Resume/Contact) measured 22px tall at 375px viewport, below the 44px tap-target guideline -- pre-existing from PF-M1-01 (already Done/QA-passed), flagged for exit-gate re-check, not a regression introduced by this card. Verdict: PASS.

cards.dod: template complete, facts accurate, live link race.aiklaotrip.com works

cards.summary: Case study 3 — Tiger Kick (CS3): frame as 'I designed a review-gated SDLC and owned the architecture', 116 GUT tests, headless 2-instance net-smoke CI.
cards.dod: template complete, process-first framing, facts accurate

cards.summary: Case study 4 — JPD API (CS4): layered Spring Boot 3, DTO boundary, RBAC, 25 tests (Mockito + MockMvc/H2).
cards.dod: template complete, facts accurate

cards.summary: Full QA pass per docs/QA_CHECKLIST.md: Lighthouse >= 95 all categories, a11y AA (keyboard, contrast, landmarks), link-check, responsive 375/768/1280, dark mode.

cards.summary: Custom domain jod.aiklaotrip.com (CNAME with human) + enable Vercel Analytics.
cards.dod: domain live over HTTPS, analytics receiving

cards.summary: Fix light-mode --ring token: teal-300 #5EEAD4 on near-white background is ~1.2-1.4:1, below WCAG 2.2 SC 1.4.11 non-text 3:1. Architect approves the new value (e.g. darker teal for light mode only); filed from PF-M1-01 code review.
cards.dod: focus ring >= 3:1 against adjacent colors in both themes, architect-approved, no regression to dark mode

cards.summary: OPTIONAL: TH/EN toggle with next-intl; EN is default.
